title: The Sphinx Knows — Guess Who in 20 Questions
hook_3s: A glowing golden question mark pulses on black as a whispered voice asks, "Is your person... still alive?" — then YES ignites in gold.
scene_flow: 0–3s HOOK: Pitch-black screen, single golden question mark pulses to a heartbeat. Whispered voiceover: 'I'm thinking of someone famous…' Overlay: 'Can the AI read your mind?'
3–7s SETUP: Thumb taps the mic. User whispers 'Is your person an athlete?' Gold soundwave ripples. Answer reveals in elegant serif: 'YES.' Question counter ticks 19→18.
7–11s ESCALATION: Rapid-fire montage of 3 questions/answers (Olympic? YES. Alive? YES. American? NO.) — counter dwindles, tension builds, golden particles swirl tighter around a silhouette.
11–14s PAYOFF: User whispers a guess. Silhouette dissolves into a gold-lit portrait reveal. Confetti of golden dust. Overlay: 'Solved in 7 questions.'
14–15s CTA: Logo lockup, tagline, install button glowing gold on black.
visual_direction: Mystical Minimalism rendered in deep obsidian (#100D06) negative space with a single luminous focal point in golden-yellow (#D4A024) and pale-gold highlights (#FCE588). Treat the screen like an oracle's chamber: thin serif typography, subtle film grain, candle-flicker glow, soft particle dust drifting upward. No clutter — every frame breathes. The only motion is the pulse of the question mark, the ripple of voice waveforms, and the slow reveal of gold-lit answers materializing from darkness. Channels the dopamine 'satisfaction' beat of the jigsaw archetype but earns it through the click of a deduced guess instead of a slotted piece.
text_overlays: Can the AI read your mind?
rationale: We keep the archetype's 'satisfaction payoff' structure but swap tactile puzzle-piece placement for the deduction dopamine of nailing a celebrity in few questions — same emotional beat, native to TheSphinx's voice/Q&A loop. The dark gold-on-black palette and whispered VO differentiate hard from the pastel jigsaw clutter saturating the feed, signaling premium/intellectual to the 25–45 trivia audience. UA should A/B the hook question ('still alive?' vs 'athlete?') and the reveal celebrity to find the highest-CTR identity.
scenario_prompts: 9:16 vertical mobile ad still, Mystical Minimalism style, near-black background (#100D06) with a single large luminous golden-yellow (#D4A024) ornate serif question mark glowing at center, pale gold (#FCE588) particle dust drifting upward, thin elegant serif text overlay 'Can the AI read your mind?' in soft gold, cinematic vignette, premium oracle-chamber atmosphere, ultra-minimal UI, film grain, hero frame
